zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alphonse de Vere於1262年之前出生在英國奧可福爾奧可福德時，他的父親Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford41歲，母親Alice Sanford32歲。他於1300年與Joan Foliot在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1328年12月20日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alphonse de Vere于1262年之前出生在英国奧可福爾奧可福德时，他的父亲Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford41岁，母亲Alice Sanford32岁。他于1300年与Joan Foliot在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1328年12月20日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Alphonse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Spanish Alfonso, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin. It is probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready, prompt’. Alternatively, the first element may be ala ‘all’, hadu ‘struggle’, or hild ‘battle’ forms are found to support each derivation, so it is possible that several Visigothic names that were originally distinct have fallen together. The -ph- spelling is the result of classical influences (or classical pretensions). St Alphonsus was a 9th-century bishop of Astorga, who spent the last years of his life at the abbey of St Stephen de Ribas de Sil in Galicia. Alphonse has been occasionally used in the English-speaking world, especially among West Indians and African Americans. The Latinized form Alphonsus has been used in Ireland as an equivalent of the Gaelic name Anluan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alphonse de Vere was born before 1262, in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford, was 41 and his mother, Alice Sanford, was 32. He married Joan Foliot in 1300, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 20 December 1328, in his hometown, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alphonse de Vere est né avant 1262, à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Sanford, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan Foliot en 1300, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 20 décembre 1328, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alphonse de Vere vor 1262 in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford 41 und seine Mutter Alice Sanford 32. Er hat 1300 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Foliot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 20. Dezember 1328 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alphonse de Vere è nato il prima del 1262 nel Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice Sanford, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan Foliot nel 1300, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 20 dicembre 1328, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alphonse de Vereが1262年以前にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードで生まれた時，父Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxfordは41歳，母Alice Sanfordは32歳であった。1300年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでJoan Foliotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1328年12月20日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alphonse de Vere(이)가 1262년 이전 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Sanford(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Joan Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 12월 20일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alphonse de Vere nasceu antes 1262, em Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Sanford, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Foliot em 1300, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 20 de dezembro de 1328, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alphonse de Vere родился перед 1262 г. в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Sanford, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Foliot в 1300 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 20 декабрь 1328 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия.
